en: Here, I've got an experiment for you, safety glasses on.
By the end of this century, if emissions keep rising,
the average temperature on Earth could go up another 4 to 8 degrees.
What I'm saying is the planet's on fucking fire.
There are a lot of things we could do to put it out.
No, of course not. Nothing's free, you idiots.
Grow the fuck up. You're not children anymore.
I didn't mind explaining photosynthesis to you when you were 12,
but you're adults now, and this is an actual crisis.
